title: helianthemum cinereum var. bicolor
intro: Helianthemum cinereum var. bicolor is a low-growing, spreading rockrose shrub native to Europe, characterized by its pink and white bi-colored flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Helianthemum cinereum var. bicolor include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to the skin or ingested as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
